overview: A full business finance dashboard for Glow & Co., a UK beauty brand. Manage invoices, bills, inventory, expenses, VAT, contacts, and reports all in one place — with pre-populated sample data for a realistic beauty brand setup.
features: Dashboard with live KPIs, charts, overdue invoices and low-stock alerts
Invoice management with branding, line items, VAT, statuses, and recurring templates
Bills & receipts tracking with categories, statuses, and file uploads
Profit & Loss reports with period comparison and PDF export
Inventory management with automatic stock reduction and low-stock alerts
Expense breakdown by category with trend charts and 20% spike flags
Contacts directory for customers and suppliers with history
Aged receivables/payables and cash flow reports
Pre-populated sample data for 9 beauty products, 15 customers, and 6 months of transactions
